req.title: Consent management
req.statement: A patient shall grant or revoke consent for data sharing; revoked consent shall be enforced within 15 minutes.
error_pathways: accesses after revoke within SLA denied

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-015 mandates patient-initiated consent grant/revoke with 15-minute enforcement SLA for cache invalidation. Test coverage must span: (1) successful consent grant and storage (positive, EP), (2) successful consent revoke with downstream denial (positive, STC), (3) invalid payload rejection (negative, NEG), (4) boundary timing at 15-minute threshold (boundary, BVA). Tests are deterministic, use mocked time where needed, and assert both API contract and cache behavior.

tests.name: test_patient_grants_consent_success
preconditions: no prior consent record for data_type='genomics'
expected: GET retrieval returns same record with granted=true
tests.executable:
import requests, json, re
from datetime import datetime

def test_patient_grants_consent_success(base_url, patient_token):
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {patient_token}'}
    payload = {
        'patient_id': 'P12345',
        'data_type': 'genomics',
        'granted': True
    }
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Consent', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    data = resp.json()
    assert 'id' in data
    assert re.match(r'^[0-9a-f\-]{36}$', data['id'])
    assert data['granted'] is True
    assert 'created_at' in data
    try:
        datetime.fromisoformat(data['created_at'].replace('Z', '+00:00'))
    except ValueError:
        pytest.fail('created_at not ISO8601')
    
    get_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/Consent/P12345', headers=headers)
    assert get_resp.status_code == 200
    get_data = get_resp.json()
    assert get_data['granted'] is True
    assert 'X-Cache-Key' in resp.headers

tests.name: test_patient_revokes_consent_enforced
preconditions: active consent exists: {patient_id: 'P67890', data_type: 'labs', granted: true, created_at: T-1day}
actions: attempt GET /data/labs/P67890 as downstream service with service token
trace: R-HLT-015: revoked consent shall be enforced
R-HLT-015: error pathway - accesses after revoke denied
R-HLT-015: expected outcome - downstream caches invalidated
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_patient_revokes_consent_enforced(base_url, patient_token, service_token, mock_time):
    patient_id = 'P67890'
    headers_patient = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {patient_token}'}
    headers_service = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {service_token}'}
    
    revoke_payload = {
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'data_type': 'labs',
        'granted': False
    }
    revoke_resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Consent', json=revoke_payload, headers=headers_patient)
    assert revoke_resp.status_code == 200
    revoke_data = revoke_resp.json()
    assert revoke_data['granted'] is False
    assert 'revoked_at' in revoke_data
    assert 'X-Cache-Invalidate' in revoke_resp.headers
    
    access_resp = requests.get(
        f'{base_url}/data/labs/{patient_id}',
        headers=headers_service
    )
    assert access_resp.status_code == 403
    assert 'consent revoked' in access_resp.json().get('reason', '').lower()

tests.name: test_revoke_enforcement_boundary_15min_sla
preconditions: active consent exists: {patient_id: 'P11111', data_type: 'imaging', granted: true}
expected: at T0 + 14m59s: access succeeds (status 200) - cache not yet invalidated
at T0 + 15m0s: access denied (status 403) - cache invalidated at SLA boundary
trace: R-HLT-015: revoked consent shall be enforced within 15 minutes
R-HLT-015: boundary condition at 15-minute SLA threshold
tests.executable:
import requests
from unittest.mock import patch
from datetime import timedelta

def test_revoke_enforcement_boundary_15min_sla(base_url, patient_token, service_token, mock_time_context):
    patient_id = 'P11111'
    headers_patient = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {patient_token}'}
    headers_service = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {service_token}'}
    
    revoke_payload = {'patient_id': patient_id, 'data_type': 'imaging', 'granted': False}
    revoke_resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Consent', json=revoke_payload, headers=headers_patient)
    assert revoke_resp.status_code == 200
    
    with mock_time_context.advance(timedelta(minutes=14, seconds=59)):
        early_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/data/imaging/{patient_id}', headers=headers_service)
        assert early_resp.status_code == 200, 'cache should not invalidate before 15min'
    
    with mock_time_context.advance(timedelta(minutes=15)):
        late_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/data/imaging/{patient_id}', headers=headers_service)
        assert late_resp.status_code == 403, 'cache must invalidate at/after 15min SLA'

actions: verify error message identifies missing field
expected: no consent record created in database

tests.name: test_consent_unauthorized_user_denied
actions: POST /Consent with valid payload and no auth header

tests.name: test_consent_idempotent_on_repeated_grant
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_consent_idempotent_on_repeated_grant(base_url, patient_token):
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {patient_token}'}
    payload = {
        'patient_id': 'P44444',
        'data_type': 'vital_signs',
        'granted': True
    }
    resp1 = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Consent', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp1.status_code == 201
    id1 = resp1.json()['id']
    
    resp2 = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Consent', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp2.status_code == 200
    id2 = resp2.json()['id']
    assert id1 == id2
    
    get_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/Consent/P44444', headers=headers)
    records = get_resp.json() if isinstance(get_resp.json(), list) else [get_resp.json()]
    assert len(records) == 1
